response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/backend engineer with broad language experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese proficiency (not listed), deep C for UNIX embedded development, Linux kernel modification experience, and embedded networking/security expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, switch chips). The resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure ~2008 at NI and no embedded networking, kernel work, or Japanese language skills, making this a poor fit for the specific requirements.
strengths: Long, varied software engineering career with strong testing/TDD discipline
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments and low-level work in DLang
Fluent English and capable of reading technical documentation
concerns: No demonstrated Linux kernel source modification or embedded firmware/switch experience
Lacks required security/networking stack expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, switch chip SDKs)

key_factors.factor: Strong general SWE background and testing rigor
